|
1 | pub mod coroutine;
  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  |
  = help: to create the module `coroutine`, create file "coroutine/src/coroutine.rs" or "coroutine/src/coroutine/mod.rs"
  = note: if there is a `mod coroutine` elsewhere in the crate already, import it with `use crate::...` instead

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0583`.
